case_title: JOHN KUNG VS. MOLIE WARD BROWN et al.

docket_entries.description: REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: SMALL CLAIMS CONTINUE ORDER MAILED TO MOLLIE BROWN ON 07/17/20. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - NOT DELIVERABLE

PROOF OF SERVICE OF [X] OTHER CONTINUED TO JAN-20-21 AT 1:30PM , IN DEPT. 506 - FEE FOR SERVICE $120.00 - FILED BY PLAINTIFF KUNG, JOHN SERVED AUG-01-2020, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT STUART MONTGOMERY BROWN
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE (SMALL CLAIMS) FILED BY DEFENDANT BROWN, MOLIE WARD

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-20-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO FEB-24-2021 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF, JOHN KUNG IS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MOLIE WARD BROWN IS PRESENT VIA COURTCALL. DEFENDANT STUART MONTGOMERY BROWN IS PRESENT IN COURT. MICHELLE KING, CLAIMS REPRESENTATIVE FOR STATE FARM INSURANCE IS PRESENT VIA COURTCALL. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IS REACHED. PLAINTIFF'S ATTORNEY IS TO SUBMIT A FINAL LIEN NOTICE TO DEFENDANT'S CLAIM REPRESENTATIVE FOR STATE FARM INSURANCE, MICHELLE KING. ONCE FINAL NOTICE IS RECEIVED, SETTLEMENT PAYMENT OF $5000.00 WILL BE ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF. PROGRESS REPORT IS SET. NO APPEARANCE REQUIRED IF PAYMENT IS MADE AS AGREED. IF NO APPEARANCE, CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. IJUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$120.00) SERVED JUL-27-2020, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT BROWN, MOLIE WARD
ORDER ON REQUEST TO APPEAR BY TELEPHONE. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED.

IF NO APPEARANCE, CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. IJUDGE: MICHELL

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - (FEE FOR SERVICE: $120.00) SERVED JUN-16-2020, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT STUART MONTGOMERY BROWN
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-24-2020 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO JAN-20-2021 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 W. TRUPEK (506)
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
